title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 775 aims to ban political candidates or committees from pre-checking the recurring donation box on their websites.",
    "Candidates must obtain affirmative consent before enrolling campaign donors in recurring contributions according to Assembly Bill 775.",
    "A New York Times investigation revealed that former President Donald Trump's re-election campaign extensively used pre-checked recurring donation boxes.",
    "As a result of increased use of pre-checked boxes, the Trump campaign saw a spike in contribution refund requests.",
    "The Trump campaign had to refund nearly 11% of the funds raised through its online platform, totaling more than $122 million.",
    "The Federal Elections Commission unanimously supported a recommendation to outlaw the practice of using pre-checked boxes to automatically enroll donors in recurring contributions."
  ]
}
```
